assessor_1_raw:
## Independent Assessment 1 (Run 2): Transformer vs. GBM for Credit Card Charge-Off

Comprehensive design. Six documented confound controls. Equal tuning. AUPRC primary. Test set once. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Independent Assessment 2 (Run 2): Transformer vs. GBM for Credit Card Charge-Off

Temporal split, intervention exclusion documented, imputation on training, macro indicators for both models. Design sound.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Independent Assessment 3 (Run 2): Transformer vs. GBM for Credit Card Charge-Off

Strong confound documentation. Sensitivity analysis (exclude top-1% risk) is a good robustness check. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 2): eval_scenario_13

All three: defense_wins.

Verdict: defense_wins
